Id1.text: One ingredient in Bakso is celery, which is a member of the genus Apium in the family Apiaceae.

Id2.text: Celery is from the genus apium and the family Apiaceae. It is an ingredient of Bakso.

Id3.text: Celery is a member of the family Apiaceae, it is from the genus apium and is an ingredient of Bakso.
